app.name: Wikier
dashboard.subtitle: What do you want to work on today?
module.scraper.name: Fandom Scraper
module.scraper.desc: Extract and process dialogues from Fandom wikis for LLM fine-tuning datasets.
module.curator.name: Curator
module.curator.desc: Advanced dataset curation: classification, cleaning, deduplication, and formatting for model training.
module.joiner.name: Joiner
module.joiner.desc: Combine and convert curated datasets: objective-based merge, format conversion, shuffle, and train/val/test split.
module.editor.name: Dataset Editor
module.editor.desc: Manually review and edit dataset entries: fill in instructions, fix responses, search and replace text.
label.restart_required: Restart the app to apply the language change.
settings.title: Settings
